metadata.title: Sofia & Mateus — We're getting married
metadata.description: Join us to celebrate the wedding of Sofia and Mateus.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: From a chance meeting to a lifetime together — we can't wait to celebrate this next chapter surrounded by the people we love.

ceremony.invitation: It is with great joy that we invite you to celebrate one of the most special days of our lives. It will be an honor to celebrate this special moment with you.
ceremony.when: Our ceremony will take place on <bold>October 17, 2026</bold>, and we kindly ask all guests to arrive at <bold>3:30 PM</bold>, so we can begin the celebration on time.
ceremony.dressCodeNote: We kindly ask that female guests avoid wearing white and ivory (off-white) colors.

reception.title: Reception
reception.body1: After the ceremony, we look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.
reception.body2: The reception will take place at the same venue, and we will be delighted to share this day with the people who are part of our story. We have prepared everything with great care to welcome you and your family.
reception.body3: We look forward to toasting, celebrating, and creating unforgettable memories together.

registry.title: Gift Registry
registry.body: If you would like to give us a gift, we have made a gift registry available to make your choice easier.

rsvp.title: Confirm Your Attendance
rsvp.intro: We would be delighted to have you with us.
rsvp.deadline: Please kindly confirm your attendance through this website by September 1, 2026, so that we can organize all the details of the celebration with the care this moment deserves.
rsvp.followUp: After you submit your confirmation, our event coordination team will contact you to validate it and provide any necessary instructions.
rsvp.thanks: Thank you for your kindness, and we look forward to celebrating this special day with you.

footer.madeWith: Made with love for Sofia & Mateus
